article.description: — Jalen Duren had 33 points and 16 rebounds and the Detroit Pistons outlasted the short-handed Cleveland Cavaliers 122-119 on Friday night in a game that was
article.headline: Pistons outlast short-handed Cavaliers 122-119 in OT after blaring horn delay

images.caption: Daniss Jenkins gets fouled with 4.7 seconds left and hits all three free throws to send the Cavaliers-Pistons game to overtime.
images.name: Daniss Jenkins hits three free throws late to send Cavs-Pistons to OT

article.linkText: Pistons outlast short-handed Cavaliers 122-119 in OT after blaring horn delay
article.story: DETROIT -- — Jalen Duren had 33 points and 16 rebounds and the Detroit Pistons outlasted the short-handed Cleveland Cavaliers 122-119 on Friday night in a game that was delayed for 18 minutes in the third quarter because of a blaring horn. During a timeout with Detroit up 65-64, a power surge caused the overhead scoreboard to malfunction, with the horn remaining on after signaling the teams to return to the floor. Eventually, the scoreboard was shut down to stop the horn and a manual airhorn was used when play resumed. Cade Cunningham had 25 points, 10 rebounds and seven assists for East-leading Detroit before fouling out. Cleveland — which will host Detroit on Tuesday night — led by nine points with 2:44 left in regulation, and Cunningham fouled out with 1:56 to play, but the Pistons outscored the Cavaliers 16-7 to force overtime. With Cleveland up 114-111 with 4.7 seconds left in regulation, Jaylon Tyson tried to intentionally foul Daniss Jenkins near halfcourt, but Jenkins was able to shoot and draw three free throws that he made. In overtime, Cleveland's Evan Mobley missed a 3-pointer at the buzzer. Jarrett Allen had 25 points and nine rebounds for Cleveland, which played its second straight game without James Harden (thumb) and Donovan Mitchell (groin). Mobley had 23 points and 12 rebounds, and Sam Merrill added 20 points. Because of the delay and overtime, the game lasted 3 hours, 22 minutes. Up next Cavaliers: At Brooklyn on Sunday. Pistons: At Orlando on Sunday. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/hub/nba

videos.description: Evan Mobley banks it off the glass at the shot-clock buzzer for a Cavaliers bucket.
videos.headline: Evan Mobley’s shot beats the buzzer

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Evan Mobley’s shot beats the buzzer) 2026/02/28 ESHEET

videos.description: Cade Cunningham catches a pass inside the paint and draws the and-1 for a Pistons bucket.
videos.headline: Cade Cunningham gets the hoop and harm

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cade Cunningham gets the hoop and harm) 2026/02/28 ESHEET

videos.description: Cade Cunningham knocks down a midrange turnaround for the Pistons.
videos.headline: Cade Cunningham sinks turnaround for Pistons

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cade Cunningham sinks turnaround for Pistons ) 2026/02/28 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Duren uses a shot fake and draws the and-1 for the Pistons.
videos.headline: Jalen Duren draws the and-1 for Pistons

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jalen Duren draws the and-1 for Pistons) 2026/02/28 ESHEET

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jalen Duren with the massive stuff 2026/02/28 ESHEET

videos.description: Evan Mobley throws down a slam dunk to extend the Cavaliers’ lead in the second quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Evan Mobley rocks the rim with slam dunk for Cavaliers) 2026/02/28 ESHEET

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jalen Duren's block sets up Pistons bucket) 2026/02/28 ESHEET

videos.description: Donovan Mitchell's courtside interview is interrupted during the Cavaliers-Pistons game when the in-arena horn malfunctions.
videos.headline: Cavs-Pistons game has lengthy delay after in-arena horn breaks

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cavs-Pistons game has lengthy delay after in-arena horn breaks ) 2026/02/287ESHEET

videos.description: Craig Porter Jr. gets a steal and dishes it off in transition to Thomas Bryant, who gets the and-1 bucket for the Cavaliers.
videos.headline: Craig Porter Jr.’s steal sets up Cavs' bucket

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Craig Porter Jr.’s steal sets up Cavs' bucket) 2026/02/28 ESHEET

videos.description: Cade Cunningham gets out in transition and finishes with a slam dunk to cut into Cavaliers’ late lead.

videos.description: Cade Cunningham scores 25 points to lift the Pistons to a 122-119 win in overtime.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cade Cunningham scores 25 points, helps Pistons edge Cavs in OT) 2026/02/28 ESHEET

videos.description: Tobias Harris hits a clutch turnaround jumper to give the Pistons the lead, and Evan Mobley's Hail Mary attempt falls short for the Cavaliers.
videos.headline: Tobias Harris’ clutch jumper helps seal Pistons' OT win
